query:
SELECT 
  segment,
  COUNT(*) as sent_count,
  MIN(smsCampaignDate) as first_sent,
  MAX(smsCampaignDate) as last_sent
FROM customers
WHERE smsCampaignSent = 1
GROUP BY segment;
command:

  segment,
  COUNT(*) as sent_count,
  MIN(smsCampaignDate) as first_sent,
  MAX(smsCampaignDate) as last_sent
FROM customers
WHERE smsCampaignSent = 1
GROUP BY segment;
